scripts.build:wasm:all: npm run build:wasm:bundler && npm run build:wasm:web
scripts.build:wasm:bundler: wasm-pack build crates/usfm_onion_wasm --target bundler --release --out-dir ../../pkg-bundler --out-name usfm_onion_web && node scripts/restore-wasm-package-layout.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:bundler:dev: wasm-pack build crates/usfm_onion_wasm --target bundler --dev --out-dir ../../pkg-bundler --out-name usfm_onion_web && node scripts/restore-wasm-package-layout.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:web: wasm-pack build crates/usfm_onion_wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../pkg-web --out-name usfm_onion_web && node scripts/restore-wasm-package-layout.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:web:dev: wasm-pack build crates/usfm_onion_wasm --target web --dev --out-dir ../../pkg-web --out-name usfm_onion_web && node scripts/restore-wasm-package-layout.mjs
scripts.test:wasm:bundler: npm run build:wasm:bundler:dev && node --experimental-wasm-modules scripts/test-web-package.mjs bundler
scripts.test:wasm:web: npm run build:wasm:web:dev && node scripts/test-web-package.mjs web
scripts.test:wasm: npm run test:wasm:bundler && npm run test:wasm:web
